payload.label: faucet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a brass-colored curved faucet spout with a reflective metal surface and visible light tarnish/patina; the fixture is partially visible and cut off by the crop edge, mounted at a sink rim and appears to be about 0.4 m from the camera.
